metadata.source: Sec. 54-306, City of Charleston Code of Ordinances
metadata.note: Where height district applies, it controls over Table 3.1. The MORE RESTRICTIVE of height district or base zoning governs.
metadata.measurement: Finish-floor to finish-floor. Max residential floor-to-floor: 12 ft (BAR may waive to 14 ft on 1st/2nd). Max non-residential story: 20 ft (BAR may waive to 25 ft).
metadata.fema_bonus: FEMA elevation adds up to +6 ft to max allowed height.
metadata.proximity_rule: Sec. 54-306(12): Structure within 50 ft of Group 1 (exceptional) or Group 2 (excellent) rated historic building cannot exceed that building's height unless BAR approves. Does NOT apply in Height District 8.
metadata.facade_rule: Height-to-eave cannot exceed 2× width of primary façade (BAR may waive).

3.notes: Attic NOT habitable; commercial GF ≤14 ft. BAR may waive attic limit.

2.5-3.5.notes: Varies by ROW width. ROW>50'=3 stories/45 ft; ROW 35-50'=1:1 ratio; ROW<35'=2.5 stories. BAR may permit up to 4 stories/45 ft for MF/PUDs.

5.notes: Appurtenances ≤9 ft; ≥5 stories requires 10 ft sidewalks

6.notes: Appurtenances ≤9 ft; >6 stories requires 10 ft sidewalks

4-12.notes: Upper Peninsula incentive-based. Base 4 stories, up to 12 via points. See UP district data.

3X.notes: Max height = 3× least dimension (ROW center to building face). Min height 30 ft.

85/200.notes: Min 30 ft, max 200 ft. ≥40 ft from ROW center. Above 85 ft: ≥55 ft from ROW, ≤50% coverage.

85/125.notes: Min 30 ft, max 125 ft. Same setback rules. Above 85 ft: ≤75% coverage.

85/30.notes: Min 30 ft, max 85 ft. ≥40 ft from ROW center.

100/30.notes: +1 story in step-back. Min GF 15 ft. 75% GF non-residential for bonus.

80/30.notes: Min 30 ft, max 80 ft. Above 55 ft: ≥25 ft from all street ROW.

50W.notes: 25 ft from high water; 10 ft from canals.

W.notes: No fixed max. Setback ≥ height. Max 25% ground coverage.

56/30V.notes: FEMA V-Zone. Min 30 ft, max 56 ft (70 ft with incentive). BAR reviews above 56 ft. 1:1 SF bonus for GF activation.

120/30.notes: Min 30 ft, max 120 ft. Above 70 ft: ≥30 ft from street ROW.

55/30S.notes: Min 30 ft, max 55 ft. No min street setback.

55/30.notes: Min 30 ft, max 55 ft. No street setback required.
